title: HitSound
description: Customize your Minecraft hit sound effects with the HitSound Mod! Select your preferred sound and adjust its volume directly through the Mod Menu for a personalized and immersive gameplay experience.
body:
The HitSound Mod enhances your Minecraft experience by letting you fully customize the sound that plays when you hit an entity. You can choose your preferred hit sound, adjust its volume and pitch, use override sounds, and enjoy instant sound changes directly from the Mod Menu settings.

- Customizable Hit Sound: Choose from a variety of sound files such as .ogg, .wav, .mp3, and more to play when you hit an entity.
- Volume Control: Adjust the hit sound volume to your liking.
- Pitch Control: Change the pitch of the hit sound for a more personalized experience.
- Override Sounds: Add and use override sounds for even more customization options.
- Instant Sound Updates: Sounds now update instantly without needing extra steps.
